Module Extern.Alloc

Builtins related to the default allocator.

See https://doc.rust-lang.org/src/alloc/alloc.rs.html

type fn =
  1. | Alloc of {
    1. zeroed : bool;
    }
  2. | Dealloc
  3. | Realloc
  4. | NoAllocShimIsUnstable
val fn_pats : (string * fn) list
